title: Add TTGO LoRa32 Renode backend
description: Add an executable ESP32 plus SX1276 Renode platform for the TTGO LoRa32 puck target. This requires an SX127x simulator peripheral distinct from the ESP32-S3/SX1262 work.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical ttgo_lora32/esp32/procpu puck ELF reaches puck main and late CoAP/status marker with independently counted simulator TX/RX; ESP32 and SX1276 model limits documented.
close_reason: Added TTGO LoRa32 ESP32+SX1276 Renode platform, SX127x.cs peripheral, esp32_lichen base; puck ELF reaches main+CoAP with counted TX/RX; docs updated; tests pass
